calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ADAM MUHAMMAD, TEL. NO. 1-415-756-0755 PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MIKEISHA SCOTT, JALON JACKSON and NATALIE DIXSON'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff Adam Muhammad's sole claim for intentional infliction of emotional distress is not uncertain and is adequately pled as to all three defendants. If defendants need more information about the claim, they should serve appropriate discovery. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

Notice Of Motion To Strike
Off Calendar May-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ADAM MUHAMMAD, TEL. NO. 1-415-756-0755 PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MIKEISHA SCOTT, JALON JACKSON and NATALIE DIXSON'S Motion To Strike the punitive damages allegations in the first amended complaint is Denied. Plaintiff Adam Muhammad has alleged sufficient facts that each of the defendants acted maliciously and oppressively as those terms are defined in the punitive damages statutes and case law. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion For Relief From Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MIKEISHA SCOTT AND JALON JACKSON'S Motion For Relief From Judgment is GRANTED. Defendants acted properly in referring the complaint to their employer's legal department with expectation it would be handled. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Off Calendar

Mtn For Prove Up Hearing (Mikeisha Scott)
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Plaintiff ADAM MUHAMMAD,
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MIKEISHA SCOTT and JALON JACKSON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Adam Muhammad sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $80,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Punitive Damages: $20,000.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $100,000.00
Judgment signed in open court.
